sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّيَّادُ يَجْلِسُ مَعَ أَوْلَادِهِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ عِنْدَ الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Ribar bi svake večeri sjedio sa svojom djecom na obali.
sentences.translationEn: The fisherman would sit with his children by the shore every evening.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَحْكِي لَهُمْ عَنِ الْبَحْرِ الْعَظِيمِ وَأَسْرَارِهِ الْخَفِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pričao im je o velikom moru i njegovim skrivenim tajnama.
sentences.translationEn: He would tell them about the great sea and its hidden secrets.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُمْ إِنَّ الْبَحْرَ يُعَلِّمُ الصَّبْرَ وَالشَّجَاعَةَ وَالتَّوَاضُعَ.
sentences.translation: Govorio im je da more uči strpljenju, hrabrosti i skromnosti.
sentences.translationEn: He told them that the sea teaches patience, courage, and humility.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَطْفَالُ يَسْتَمِعُونَ وَعُيُونُهُمْ تَلْمَعُ فِي ضَوْءِ النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su slušala, a oči su im se sjajile u svjetlosti vatre.
sentences.translationEn: The children listened with eyes glistening in the firelight.

sentences.arabic: نَامُوا عَلَى الرَّمْلِ وَفِي قُلُوبِهِمْ حُبٌّ لِلْبَحْرِ وَحَنِينٌ لِلْمَغَامَرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaspali su na pijesku s ljubavlju prema moru i čežnjom za pustolovinom u srcima.
sentences.translationEn: They fell asleep on the sand with love for the sea and a longing for adventure in their hearts.
